title: Dashboard Enhancement Suggestion

posts.author: ywoitscheck (Yuri Woitscheck)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’m new to Monday.com but it feels as though the Dashboard capability is one of weaker areas of the platform.

Would like to suggest several things that may enhance the product that we have encountered:

  1. In Dashboard have a “Select All Boards” feature. Currently you have to manually choose and associate each board
  2. Allow for WAY more then 10 boards to be part of each Dashboard
  3. Allow Dashboards to needle into specific items rather then aggregate of column in group. ie: provide flexibility to get as granular as needed

Appreciate the willingness to accept feedback and look forward to future enhancements.

Yuri
